name: x-to-markdown
description: Convert X/Twitter posts, threads, and long-form X Articles into Markdown with YAML frontmatter.

interface.shortDescription: Convert X/Twitter posts, threads, and Articles to Markdown.
interface.longDescription: Archive X/Twitter posts, threads, and long-form X Articles as clean Markdown with YAML frontmatter using the official X API v2. No scraping, cookies, telemetry, or account-session access.
defaultPrompt: Convert this X/Twitter URL to Markdown:
